shared_properties: Asset remains readable at 1x scale within the warm cage scene.
Core palette fields stay fixed at primary #1D2B53, background #FFF1E8, and accent #FF004D.
Flat pixel rendering and 1px outlines keep interaction targets crisp.
differences: State sheet includes full, half, and empty bowl readouts for hunger feedback.
This prop anchors the feed interaction zone on the lower left area.
Visual separation between the three fill levels stays readable at 1x scale.

reference_images.label: seed_object_reference
reference_images.purpose: Grounds seed scale, bowl contents, and feeding affordance details.

reference_images.label: care_system_reference
reference_images.purpose: Grounds feed interaction timing, bowl fill states, and care-trigger flow.

reference_images.label: cage_object_reference
reference_images.purpose: Grounds cage-prop placement and relative scale inside the 128x128 enclosure.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: TextureAtlas-driven sprite entity with fixed virtual-pixel scaling.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load cage_seed_bowl_3state.png via AssetServer during Loading state, then bind handles by task_id for deterministic system lookup.
runtime_notes: Use nearest-neighbor sampling and a 128x128 virtual canvas so every authored pixel remains crisp after upscale.
Drive state swaps through atlas index changes or visibility toggles instead of runtime repainting to preserve palette invariance.
Attach marker components so CareSystem, BehaviorSystem, TimeSystem, and HUD systems can target the asset without filename inference.

context.usage: Tap/drag feed interaction anchor; communicates hunger state.

state_rules: full: seed pixels cover about 70% of bowl interior
half: seed pixels cover about 35% of bowl interior

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 48x10px (3 states × 16x10) with 0px spacing.
Bowl outline is 1px using #1D2B53; bowl fill uses #C2C3C7 and rim detail uses #AB5236.
Each state is visually distinct at 1x scale and remains legible on #FFF1E8 background.
